brief.projectDescription: A high-impact, acid-graphics styled promotional landing page for a Halloween event or flash sale targeting Gen-Z and trend-conscious audiences.

productScope.mvpDefinition: A single-page high-energy landing experience with event/product details, a countdown timer, and a clear conversion CTA.
productScope.coreOutcome: Users understand the event/offer value proposition and complete a registration or purchase action.
productScope.businessGoal: Drive ticket sales or product conversions through a visually arresting seasonal campaign.
productScope.audienceSummary: Gen-Z, creative professionals, and nightlife enthusiasts who resonate with avant-garde aesthetic trends.

roles.summary: A person looking for unique Halloween experiences or exclusive seasonal deals.
goals: Quickly grasp the event vibe and details
Secure a spot or purchase a product

taskLoops.name: Quick Conversion Journey
taskLoops.summary: The path from landing on the page to completing the primary call to action.
taskLoops.entryTrigger: User clicks an ad or social media link
steps: Land on hero section with high-impact acid visuals
Scroll to view event lineup or product highlights
Observe the urgency via the countdown timer
Click the 'Get Tickets' or 'Shop Now' button

capabilities.name: Acid Aesthetic Narrative
capabilities.summary: Using distorted typography, chrome textures, and neon colors to create a 'trippy' Halloween atmosphere.

capabilities.name: Direct Conversion Flow
capabilities.summary: A streamlined process to capture user intent and process a ticket/order.

designIntent.colorDirection: Neon greens (#CCFF00), electric purples, and hot pinks set against a deep grainy black and metallic chrome accents.
designIntent.style: Acid Graphics / Neo-Brutalism: Heavy use of warped typography, liquid metal textures, scanlines, and 90s rave aesthetics.

informationArchitecture.navigationModel: Single-page scrolling with anchored navigation and a persistent floating CTA.

pageMap.title: Acid Halloween Experience
pageMap.purpose: Main landing hub to showcase the vibe and drive conversions.

pageMap.title: You're In
pageMap.purpose: Confirmation page after a successful conversion.

notes: Emphasis on smooth scrolling and scroll-triggered animations to enhance the 'acid' feel.

layoutSections.intent: Provide minimal, non-intrusive links to key sections and a persistent 'Buy' button.
layoutSections.contentHints: Logo in liquid metal style, 'Lineup', 'Location', 'Tickets' links, and a neon CTA button.

designPlan.goal: Provide a persistent, high-contrast anchor for navigation and conversion.
designPlan.roleFit: Ensures the Event Seeker can always find the 'Buy' path regardless of scroll depth.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Maintains the 'Click CTA' step of the conversion loop.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Showcases the acid aesthetic through a liquid metal logo and neon accents.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Logo left, anchored links center, high-visibility CTA right.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Floating glassmorphic or high-contrast solid bar with minimal padding.
designPlan.visualIntent: Sharp, neon-bordered container with metallic typography.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Smooth scroll to anchors; hover states use glitch or color-shift effects.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Minimalist text to keep focus on the visual energy of the page.
constraints: Must remain legible against high-contrast backgrounds
CTA must be the most vibrant element
designPlan.rationale: A floating nav ensures the conversion path is never more than one click away in a long-scroll experience.

layoutSections.intent: Social links and legal info styled with brutalist typography.
layoutSections.contentHints: Instagram/TikTok icons, copyright, terms, and a 'Stay Spooky' sign-off.

designPlan.goal: Finalize the brand experience and provide secondary social engagement.
designPlan.roleFit: Gives the Event Seeker a place to follow the brand on social platforms.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Captures users who reach the end of the page without converting.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Reinforces the 'Acid Aesthetic' through heavy, distorted brutalist type.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Large brand sign-off, social grid, legal footer.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Full-width block with oversized typography and high-contrast borders.
designPlan.visualIntent: Grainy black background with neon green or hot pink text.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Static but visually loud; social icons should have 'grow' or 'glitch' hovers.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Bold, short copy that maintains the 'spooky' and 'experimental' tone.
constraints: Maintain high contrast for legal text
designPlan.rationale: The footer serves as the final punchy statement of the acid-graphics brand identity.

pages.title: Acid Halloween Experience
pages.description: The main immersive landing page for the Halloween event.

sections.intent: Immediate visual impact using acid graphics and the main headline.
sections.contentHints: Warped H1 text, 3D floating chrome pumpkin/skull, animated grain background, main 'Enter the Void' CTA.

designPlan.role: Page opener and value proposition anchor
designPlan.goal: Hook the user instantly with a 'trippy' and high-energy visual statement.
designPlan.roleFit: The Event Seeker immediately recognizes the 'vibe' they are looking for.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: The first step of the conversion journey: landing and engagement.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Primary showcase for distorted typography and chrome textures.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Centered headline, floating 3D asset, primary CTA button.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Full-screen centered layout with depth created by overlapping elements.
designPlan.visualIntent: Maximalist, high-contrast, using neon green and grainy black.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Parallax movement on the 3D asset; hover effects on the CTA.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Short, punchy, and evocative copy ('Enter the Void').
constraints: Headline must remain readable despite distortion
CTA must pop against the background
designPlan.rationale: The hero section sets the entire aesthetic tone and establishes the 'Acid Halloween' brand identity.

sections.intent: Create urgency for the event or sale.
sections.contentHints: Large digital glitch-style numbers counting down to Oct 31st.

designPlan.goal: Build psychological pressure to act before the event starts.
designPlan.roleFit: Reminds the Event Seeker that time is limited to secure their spot.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Supports the 'Observe Urgency' step of the conversion loop.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Uses 'glitch' aesthetics to reinforce the spooky/experimental theme.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Large numeric display with minimal labels (Days, Hours, Mins).
designPlan.layoutIntent: Horizontal strip or centered block with heavy borders.
designPlan.visualIntent: Monospaced digital font with flickering or glitch animations.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Subtle screen-shake or color-flicker on second changes.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Focus purely on the numbers to let the urgency speak for itself.
constraints: Animation should not trigger photosensitivity issues
designPlan.rationale: A countdown is a classic conversion tool, here elevated by the acid-glitch aesthetic.

sections.intent: Showcase the event lineup or product features in a chaotic grid.
sections.contentHints: Cards with high-contrast borders, distorted images, and bold sans-serif headers.

designPlan.goal: Detail the 'what' and 'who' of the event in a visually engaging way.
designPlan.roleFit: Helps the Event Seeker understand the value and specific attractions.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Provides the 'view highlights' step of the journey.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Uses neo-brutalist grid structures and high-contrast imagery.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Asymmetric grid of cards with varying sizes.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Chaotic but balanced grid with overlapping text and images.
designPlan.visualIntent: Duo-tone images (purple/green) with thick black borders.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Cards tilt or change color on hover.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Artist names or feature titles in oversized, bold type.
constraints: Grid must collapse gracefully on mobile
Text contrast on cards must meet standards
designPlan.rationale: The chaotic grid mirrors the 'acid' theme while organizing complex information.

sections.contentHints: High-visibility pricing table or ticket selector with a vibrant 'Secure Access' button.

designPlan.goal: Finalize the user's decision and capture the ticket/order.
designPlan.roleFit: Provides the Event Seeker with a clear, frictionless way to 'Secure Access'.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: The final 'Click CTA' and 'Complete Form' step.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Streamlined UI for the 'Direct Conversion Flow'.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Pricing tiers or simple selector followed by a large button.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Centered, high-impact block with a distinct background color (e.g., Hot Pink).
designPlan.visualIntent: Clean but bold UI elements set against a vibrant, energetic background.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Button should have a high-energy 'pulse' or 'glow' effect.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Direct, action-oriented copy ('Secure Your Spot Now').
constraints: Button must be the most prominent element on the page
designPlan.rationale: This section strips away the 'acid' noise to focus purely on the conversion action.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: The main immersive landing page for the Halloween event.
pageDesignPlan.roleFit: This page primarily serves Event Seeker.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Acid Aesthetic Narrative, Direct Conversion Flow understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through Quick Conversion Journey, Quick Conversion Journey, Quick Conversion Journey.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Move from orientation to persuasion, then social proof, and finish with a decisive conversion close.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the entry stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed Acid Halloween Experience around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.

pages.title: You're In
pages.description: Confirmation page for users who have registered or purchased.

sections.intent: Confirm success and provide next steps.
sections.contentHints: Glitch-animated 'Confirmed' text, QR code for entry, and 'Add to Calendar' button.

designPlan.goal: Provide clear proof of purchase and actionable next steps.
designPlan.roleFit: Ensures the Event Seeker feels secure in their purchase.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: The final success state of the journey.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Large confirmation header, QR code block, utility buttons.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Vertical stack, centered, with a clean white or neon background for the QR area.
designPlan.visualIntent: High-energy glitch animations on the 'Confirmed' text; clean utility for the rest.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Buttons for 'Add to Calendar' and 'Share' should be highly interactive.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Triumphant and welcoming ('You're in the Void').
constraints: QR code must be scannable on all devices
Maintain brand voice even in utility sections
designPlan.rationale: The success message bridges the gap between the wild aesthetic and the practical needs of the user.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: Confirmation page for users who have registered or purchased.
pageDesignPlan.roleFit: This page primarily serves Event Seeker.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Direct Conversion Flow understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through Quick Conversion Journey.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Keep the page tightly focused: establish value, support it, then convert.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the action stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed You're In around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.
